disclaimer.cardOne:
### 🧪 Test mode

This AI assistant is currently in **test mode**. 
Responses may be _incomplete or inaccurate_.
disclaimer.cardTwo:
### 📚 Loading legal documents

The bot is currently learning based on the **Labor Code of the Republic of Uzbekistan**. 
_Other legislative acts have not yet been fully loaded or studied._
disclaimer.cardThree:
### ⚖️ For legal questions only

Please ask questions related only to **labor relations**. 
_The bot is not designed for technical or personal consultations._
disclaimer.cardFour:
### 📌 Not official advice

The bot's responses are generated **solely for informational purposes**. 
_They do not substitute official legal advice._

info.title: Dashboard
info.organizationsDesc: Complete information about all organizations, branches, and management within the system of JSC 'Uzbekistan Railways'. Learn about their location, hierarchy, and structure.
info.positionsDesc: List of positions available at JSC 'Uzbekistan Railways' and their functional responsibilities. Structural distribution of employee positions is provided.
info.laborCodeDesc: Based on the Labor Code of the Republic of Uzbekistan, it regulates relationships, rights, and obligations between employees and employers. Explanations and legislative norms are provided by articles.
info.emptyDesc: There is no information in this section yet. New services or useful content will be added soon.

telegramPopup.header: Connect to our Telegram bot and enjoy the following benefits:

benefit.1: Document statuses – Approval, rejection, or editing — you'll be informed about everything!
benefit.2: Greetings – We’ll remember your birthday or work achievements!
benefit.3: Important reminders – Timely notifications about vacations, meetings, and important information.
benefit.4: Real-time notifications – Nothing will go unnoticed!
benefit.5: Profile updates – Any changes to your data will be instantly reflected in Telegram!
benefit.footer: Everything in one place – just for you and on time!
